name: Stata Lobby Pharos printers
notes: Closest public Pharos printer location for CSAIL/Stata. MIT printer locations list color hostname stata-color.mit.edu and black-and-white hostname stata-p.mit.edu.

name: CSAIL Doggett large format printer
network_required: CSAILPrivate wireless or wired CSAIL Ethernet in Building 32
notes: CSAIL TIG lists Doggett as the self-service large-format printer outside TIG in 32-270.

name: CSAIL TIG office printing help
notes: CSAIL TIG says printing/copy/scan service issues can be handled by emailing help@csail.mit.edu or stopping by 32-270. This is support, not a public printer queue.

name: Barker Library Pharos printers
notes: Library printers: 5th floor, past west stairwell; two color printers.

name: Hayden Library Pharos printers
notes: 1st floor, center scan and print room; two color and one black-and-white printer.

name: Dewey Library Pharos printers
notes: 1st floor near computer cluster; one color and one black-and-white printer. 24/7 space also has one color printer.

name: Lewis Music Library Pharos printer
notes: 1st floor, after service desk; one color printer.

name: Rotch Library Pharos printers
notes: 2nd floor, adjacent to Athena cluster; two color printers.
